creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: kai
Date: Wed Mar  3 13:37:11 UTC 2021
New revision: 567082
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/567082

Log:
  x11/xpra: Fix packaging with Python 3.8

  While I'm here:

  * Fix pkg-plist entries of the AVAHI option which contained hardcoded Python
    version artifacts.

  * Add "noflavors" to USE_PYTHON to avoid package name collisions if built
    with "BUILD_ALL_PYTHON_FLAVORS".

  PR:		253815
  Approved by:	python (with hat)

Changes:
  head/x11/xpra/Makefile
  head/x11/xpra/pkg-plist
